conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 7 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment
Definition: What the number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm of the clinical trial with a high volume or burden of metastatic disease? If reported, include count and/or percentage. If multiple relevant arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="92 (48%)" | page=3 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table 1, row 'High-volume disease (%)', column 'ADT plus D (n = 192)'."
  B: value="92 (48%)" | page=3 | modality=table | reasoning="From Table 1 on page 3, under 'ADT plus D (n = 192)' and row 'High-volume disease (%)'."

---
